allow: Bash(cross-env NODE_ENV=dev dotenv -e .env.dev -- npx prisma migrate dev --schema=./prisma/schema --name init)

Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; print\('\\n'.join\(k for k in deps if any\(x in k for x in ['multer','cloudinary','aws','s3','sharp','mime']\)\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps={**d.get\('dependencies',{}\),**d.get\('devDependencies',{}\)}; [print\(k,v\) for k,v in deps.items\(\)]")
Bash(python -c "import json,sys; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k in ['scripts','dependencies','devDependencies']}, indent=2\)\)")
